title: Rocket-like UFO seen by two pilots and an air traffic controller in São Luís [2001]
excerpt: JULY 12th, 2001. Time: 7:05 pm. Duration: 10 minutes. At least three witnesses spotted an unidentified flying object moving at high speed and at an altitude of approximately 60,000ft. The rocket-like object left clear trails when it was moving in the North/Northeast direction. The UFO was also sighted by two more people besides the operator […]
text_preview: JULY 12th, 2001. Time: 7:05 pm. Duration: 10 minutes. At least three witnesses spotted an unidentified flying object moving at high speed and at an altitude of approximately 60,000ft. The rocket-like object left clear trails when it was moving in the North/Northeast direction. The UFO was also sighted by two more people besides the operator of the Control Tower at the Airport of São Luís, State of Maranhão. The  UFO was seen by the pilots of the VSP4198 from Teresina to São Luís and TAM from Fortaleza to São Luís. Also to the report of COMDABRA [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command], the witnes
summary: Two airline pilots and an air traffic controller at São Luís airport independently observed a rocket-like UFO leaving white trails at ~60,000 ft heading north-northeast.
